description: Each timepiece from giordano has an elegant, contemporary look and advanced Japanese movements, seamlessly blended with classic, timeless designs. A watch designed for modern life but remaining true to its heritage. Case diameter: 32 mm Case thickness: 5 mm Dial shape: Square Warranty: 1 Year Black coloured steel case for durability, style and comfort Black coloured textured strap with a butterfly clasp Black and grey dial with metallic hands Screw to reset time Solid case back for enhanced durability Branding at the 12 hour mark Water resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to use it even when showering or in light rain
